error_signature: SAML Authentication failed: Invalid SAML response
title: SAML Authentication fails due to missing attributes
symptom: When attempting to authenticate via SAML, n8n returns a 401 error indicating that the SAML response is invalid due to missing attributes.
not_this_if: SAML authentication works for other users
root_cause: The error occurs because the SAML response does not include necessary user attributes such as email address, UPN, first name, and last name. This can happen if the identity provider is not configured to send these attributes in the SAML assertion.
fix_steps: Check the SAML configuration in your identity provider.
Ensure that the attributes 'emailaddress', 'upn', 'firstname', and 'lastname' are included in the SAML response.
Update the SAML settings in n8n to match the attributes being sent.
agent_instruction: Verify and update the SAML attributes in your identity provider to include the required fields.
